Christmas Email Promotion #2         				    Copyright Free Template



Subject Line: Treat Yourself: Great Blowout Holiday Sale Starting NOW



Find the gift that didn’t make it under the Christmas tree this year when you shop at our exciting blowout event. 



[insert details of savings here]



No gifts that you don't really need or don't really help you. 



No sweater or tie that gets put in your closet andforgotten about. 



No decorative piece that you have to remember to put 

out every time your mother-in-law comes to visit.



You’ll get the gift you truly want such as:



[insert what they’ll get as part of the deal, including the

transformation you provide, benefits, etc.]



Leave it to our little helpers. With our blowout sale, you’re

sure to get what you REALLY want this year and most 

importantly—[insert transformation they’ll experience]



But hurry, if you leave it to Santa to bring you these gifts, 

you might end up out of luck. 



This Christmas Blowout sale ends at Midnight on 

December 24th.



Happy Holidays!



[insert name]



P.S. There are no worries of the Holiday Blues with these

gifts. 



Each and every one of these gifts comes with a 365

day money-back guarantee. 



If for any reason you feel this isn’t right for you, return your 

purchase and we’ll give you every cent of your money back. 



[Link to Squeeze Page: I want to treat myself this year]
